MODULE: cosmos.secrets.hashicorp_vault
FILE: cosmos/secrets/hashicorp_vault.py (481 lines)
CATEGORY: secrets

DESCRIPTION: cosmos HashiCorp Vault Integration

"A vault within a vault? How delightfully recursive!"

HashiCorp Vault secrets management.

CLASSES:
- HashiCorpVaultProvider(SecretsProvider): HashiCorp Vault secrets provider.

Features:
- KV secrets engine (v1 and v2)
- D
  Methods: async def get_secret(self, path: str, version: int=None) -> Optional[Secret]
  Methods: async def set_secret(self, secret: Secret) -> bool
  Methods: async def delete_secret(self, path: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def list_secrets(self, path_prefix: str='') -> List[str]
  Methods: async def rotate_secret(self, path: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def list_versions(self, path: str) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: async def destroy_version(self, path: str, versions: List[int]) -> bool
  Methods: async def undelete_version(self, path: str, versions: List[int]) -> bool
